/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/app/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/app/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/physics/atmosphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/physics/forces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/physics/heat_transfer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/physics/units.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/rendering/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/rendering/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/rendering/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/rendering/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/rendering/gl_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/geometry/scramjet_geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/visualization/streamlines.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/visualization/contours.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/visualization/force_arrows.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cfd_studio_cpp.dir/src/ui/ui_manager.cpp.o -o cfd_studio_cpp  -lglfw -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
